name: Noble Reincarnation: Born Blessed, So I'll Obtain Ultimate Power
original_name: 貴族転生 ～恵まれた生まれから最強の力を得る～
overview: Noa’s past life as a young adult villager was nothing to write home about. But now he’s reborn as the 13th prince of an empire! His stats screen reveal that he’ll grow stronger proportionately to the number of people serving under him. To gain ultimate power, he’ll do whatever it takes to make sure that those who serve him shall serve him for life!
